addressed: superset/utils/core.py: Narrowed except Exception to except ValueError for urlparse, added logger.warning with exc_info=True

structured_output.reasoning: Nine exception handlers across core application code silently discarded errors. Each was remediated by adding logger.warning(..., exc_info=True) to preserve stack traces for debugging. One except clause was narrowed from Exception to ValueError where only urlparse errors are expected. The standalone CLI script (lint_metadata.py) uses print(stderr) instead of logging per its existing patterns. All changes are minimal and preserve original fallback behavior. Pre-commit hooks (mypy, ruff, pylint, ruff-format) pass on all changed files.
